title: New Feature Alert! Select the Group for Your Recurring Tasks
excerpt:
We’re excited to announce a new feature for Recurring Tasks that we think you’ll love. Many of you have asked for more flexibility in managing where your recurring tasks appear, and we’ve listened.

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce a new feature for Recurring Tasks that we think you’ll love. Many of you have asked for more flexibility in managing where your recurring tasks appear, and we’ve listened.

Starting now, you can select the specific group within your board where each recurring task will be created. This means greater control over your workflows and easier organization tailored to your team’s unique needs.

Imagine setting recurring tasks to automatically appear in different project phases, departments, or priority buckets, without having to manually move them after creation. This improvement helps save you time and keep your boards organized and focused.

Try it out and share your feedback with us! As always, your input helps us build the best possible product!

Screenshot 2025-11-19 at 12.24.311716×966 126 KB
